title: corchorus elachocarpus
intro: Corchorus elachocarpus, also known as the jute mallow, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corchorus elachocarpus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
